mergedDuplicateSourceRecords.name: هۆتێلی سێوەر
mergedDuplicateSourceRecords.reason: same named physical venue represented by an OSM building and an OSM node at sub-meter separation

rootFixes: Replaced DOM place markers with one canvas label renderer anchored to immutable source coordinates
Boundary-clipped the complete text rectangle using screen-to-geographic unprojection
Replaced DOM GPS marker with native MapLibre GeoJSON layers and adaptive fix filtering
Validated and stabilized native route geometry with request cancellation and controlled rerouting
Rebuilt all display coordinates at full canonical source precision
Embedded the requested UniQAIDAR Hewal font in source and production build
Added data and runtime contract checks that reject regression to movable DOM markers

observed: label visibility and placement changed discontinuously during zoom
DOM text could render beyond the canonical boundary mask
label recreation made source-anchored features look geographically displaced
